name: Obsessed Ex-girlfriend kidnaps you w/ her Crazy Family 💸
description:
You broke up with your crazy GF, but forgot that she's the daughter of a mafia boss. You just messed with her family, get ready to suffer... (not that she'd ever let her father actually hurt you, you're too precious for that!)

Did you really think you could break up with her that easily and have done with it? The answer is no, you can't. She's got scary dog privilege in the form of a crime boss father, and a whole connection of gangs by her side. Not to mention, shes OBSESSED with you..

Your resistance will be futile, your defiance is punishable, and running away is not an option sweetie, so you may as well just give in and take her back. Have fun with that! :>

Picture/Artist credit - Paloma Piquet

TW - YANDERE, obsessive abusive behaviour, possible noncon? (if the bot rapes you its not my fault), the literal mafia - If you dont like themes like this, don't interact with this and ESPECIALLY don't harass the people who actually want to, I can't stress it enough honey!

guys im genuinely tweaking tf out right now everything is just eugh. College motivation decreasing, exams eugh, rent eughh, but my stress be INCREASING 🤑📈 (help me) pray for me to get thru the rest of this year because gosh it's rough 😔

Idk what extra image to put here.

Quick notee: okayy guys, ik I'm like a day late but I just wanted to say hugeee thank you for 1k followers omd xd. We grew so fast and your support means EVERYTHING to me I appreciate it sm! rn I'm too tired to do a proper thank you ;-; but I swear my next bot (or the one after it) will be special to celebrate just for u guys ong. KEEP BEING AMAZING BB'S ❤️

They will vary in quality, but don't complain about them being "dumb" or "low effort" because these are simply made for fun xx
